Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(cp-20\): implement discrete environmental damage resolution

Adds contact hazard resolution per CP-20 design doc:
- Fire squares \(1d6 fire\)
- Acid pools \(1d6 acid\)
- Lava edges \(2d6 fire\)
- Spiked pits \(falling + 1d6 piercing\)

G-T1 compliant: no persistence, no durations, no relational state.
RNG: "combat" stream only.
Ordering: AoO → Movement → Hazard → Environmental damage.

21 new tests, all 751 tests pass in <2s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: adopt design doctrine layer, freeze philosophy, add execution roadmap v3

DESIGN LAYER FROZEN - 2026-02-09

Added core design documents \(ADOPTED\):
- SESSION_ZERO_RULESET_AND_BOUNDARY_CONFIG.md
- CHARACTER_SHEET_UI_CONTRACT.md  
- VOICE_INTENT_AND_CLARIFICATION_PROTOCOL.md
- LLM_ENGINE_BOUNDARY_CONTRACT.md
- LOCAL_RUNTIME_PACKAGING_STRATEGY.md
- SOLO_FIRST_PREPARATORY_DM_MODEL.md

Strategic alignment:
- Solo-first experience target
- Campaign preparation as first-class phase
- Voice-first UI with theatre-of-the-mind default
- Contextual grid \(combat only\)
- LLM cage doctrine \(creative freedom, mechanical authority\)
- Fully local, offline-capable execution

Added execution roadmap v3.0:
- 7-phase implementation plan
- Detailed task breakdown \(~80 tasks\)

- Hardware requirements
- Success criteria

- Post-CP20 decision analysis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
